candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line, but appears identical to Net Sales while other income is reported separately; Net Sales is the cleaner top-line sales label.
Non-operating disposal gain, not revenue.
Balance sheet contract asset / receivable-related item, not income statement revenue.
Direct top-line sales/revenue line and preferable to subtotal Total Revenue when both are present.
Balancing row, not a reported revenue line.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer Net Sales; use Total Revenue only as fallback if labels vary by year.

candidates.why: Best match for direct service/material input costs and the only clear cost-of-sales style line.

variables.notes: Selected the clearest direct production/service cost line.

candidates.why: Core operating overhead component.

candidates.row_label: Final salary outgoing President and CEO
candidates.why: Specific one-off compensation item; too narrow/nonrecurring to represent SG&A generally.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal exists. Candidate list misses the broader populated overhead row 'Other costs', which appears to be a better recurring SG&A component than the sparse 'Other operating expenses'. Chose Personnel costs plus Other costs as the best overhead buckets; manual review recommended because one selected row is outside the candidate list and 'Other costs' could include some mixed items. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other costs

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line on the income statement; best match even if preview is empty.

Balance sheet net asset, not period expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer direct Interest Expense, then lease-interest line, then broader Financial expenses as last fallback for years where specific interest lines are missing.
